inputs.label: Gradians
inputs.businessContext: Angle measured in gradians to be converted to degrees.

inputs.label: Instrument Gain
inputs.businessContext: Calibration gain (multiplicative factor) for the conversion. Default 0.9 represents the standard gradians-to-degrees ratio.

inputs.label: Instrument Offset
inputs.businessContext: Calibration offset in degrees added after conversion to correct systematic error.

inputs.label: Rounding Decimals
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final degrees output. e.g., 2 results in two decimal places.
